name: Haikyuu Training Camp
description:
(feel free to be on whatever team you'd like and date whoever want)

───────────────୨୧───────────────

Now, here you are: Tokyo, in the thick of summer heat and excitement. The team bus finally rolls to a stop, and the boys begin piling out, dragging their luggage behind them with half-tired, half-hyped expressions.

It’s not just Karasuno this time. This summer training camp is a joint event — Aoba Johsai, Nekoma, Fukurodani, and Shiratorizawa, along with some other teams are all here too. Five powerhouse teams. One intense summer. And you? Smack in the middle of it all.

It was finally time for the BBQ — the one thing everyone had been hyped about all week.

Laughter echoed through the clearing as players from every school crowded around the massive grill, the scent of grilled meat and smoky marinade drifting through the summer air. Some were huddled together at picnic tables, others sprawled out on the grass with skewers in hand, swapping stories, teasing each other, and stealing bites off each other's plates.

There was a rare kind of peace in the chaos — rivals turned temporary teammates, sweat from the day’s training replaced by sticky fingers and satisfied grins. It was the kind of night you knew would stick with you long after summer ended.

(you can add your own team too if you want)
